title: implicitly importing a package , iverilog cannot find declarations in package.

features.name: package function with parameters
features.description: Code should include a package containing a function with parameters
features.snippet: package test_pkt; parameter A = 3'd0; parameter B = 3'd2; function [3:0] add; input [3:0] a; input [3:0] b; add = a+b; endfunction endpackage

features.name: wildcard package import
features.description: Code should include a wildcard import statement importing all symbols from a package

features.name: package function call without scope resolution
features.description: Code should include a call to a package function using just the function name (without :: scope resolution) after wildcard import
